Title: Bun vs Node.js Performance: Why Your Event Loop Is the Real Bottleneck
Description: Bun is faster than Node.js — but switching runtimes won't fix a saturated connection pool or a blocking Event Loop. This guide covers what Bun actually speeds up, why Promise.all kills your p99 latency, how JSC and V8 GC differ under load, and when migrating to Bun is actually worth it.

Title: 9 Ways to Fail at Installing a Browser Extension — Daniel Walker
Description: All I wanted was for an extension to auto-update. Two hours later, I'm impersonating an IT department.

Title: The Singularity is Coming
Description: It is not uncommon for popular culture to pick up on a concept from science and twist it until it is nearly unrecognizable. The concept of the “technological singularity” is no exception. Still, when the singularity is talked about as “the machines taking over” or the point at which we all “upload our consciousness to the cloud”, we have strayed so far from the term’s original meaning that it is worth revisiting what the term was meant to convey.

Title: The Claude Dichotomy
Description: AI is creating a genuine dichotomy: teams drowning in AI-supercharged chaos, others are thriving. The difference is in the approach to transformation.

Title: Who's Writing the Spec?
Description: Why the bottleneck of knowledge work isn't production but the ability to say what you want. On Taste, Specification, and Evaluation -- the three competencies that are suddenly scarce.

Title: Vibe Coding, QWERTY, and US Healthcare - or: The Future of Software Engineering?

Title: Do Not Turn Child Protection Into Internet Access Control
Description: Age verification turns the open internet into a permission system and pushes control away from families, schools, and users.
